name: Your bet with a coworker (Wife POV)
description:
You're amazing at sex, even your husband Timmy thinks so! At work you were talking with some coworkers about sex, and it came out just how amazing you are. Your Coworker Billy after hearing this believed he was better.

So he made a bet with you. Whoever cums first loses. Winner gets to go on a fully paid vacation to Hawaii. If you win, you’ll get to take your husband Timmy on the trip. If Billy wins he goes with you instead. Remember, you aren't doing this to cuck Timmy (or are you?) you're doing it to win!

Be a good sex master and make sure you win this bet, Hawaii awaits!

This is the requested FemPOV version that multiple asked for in the Netori version. After this I don't plan to return to this scene any more. I don't think there are any other POV's really to tackle. So, let's put this to bed. Up next will be FemPOV of Kiki your futa step daughter. Fuck billy and shame your husband, fuck billy and win and enjoy a week trip with your husband, fuck them both, go wild!

The Netori Cowerer version for male POV is here: Wife's bet with a coworker (Coworker POV)

The NTR version for those who like to watch is here: Wife's bet with a coworker (Husband POV)
Avoidable NTR version for those who want drama here: Wife's bet with a coworker AVOIDABLE ALT (Husband POV)

Keep an eye out for more nsfw plots.
